content.en:
Fengyang High Plains.

Ye Tian came here to visit the Void White Dao Ancestor.

The Void White Dao Ancestor did not establish any forces, but lived in the Void White Divine Mountain, ordinary people could not reach here, at least they had to take half a step of the Sixfold Ancestor to reach the Void White Divine Mountain.

Of course, there was nothing important, and the ordinary half-step sixfold ancestor would not dare to disturb this Void White Dao Ancestor.

"Void White Dao Ancestor, Void Tooth Holy Gate Endless Saint Ancestor is here to visit!"

Ye Tian's voice came to the Void White Divine Mountain.

Soon, a voice came.

"Endless Holy Ancestor, please come in!"

As soon as the words fell, a golden road crossed over.

Ye Tian walked on the golden path, and in the blink of an eye, he entered the Void White Divine Mountain.

......

"Endless Holy Ancestor, I didn't expect you to come to visit me!"

Xubai Dao Ancestor was a little surprised.

"I'm here to ask the Void White Dao Ancestor, please forgive me for bothering me!" Ye Tian hurriedly said.

"Hahaha!! "Void White Dao Ancestor said with a smile, "It's my honor that the Endless Holy Ancestor came to ask me!"

He would not treat Ye Tian as an ordinary half-step sixfold ancestor, but as a Dao ancestor of the same level.

Moreover, once Ye Tian becomes the Sixfold Ancestor, his strength will instantly surpass him, and the future will not be comparable to him!

Therefore, he is also willing to make friends with a demon like Ye Tian.

After Ye Tian chatted with the Void White Dao Ancestor for a while, he began to ask: "Void White Dao Ancestor, I am very close to the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, and I want to condense the Dao Fruit, and before condensing the Dao Fruit, I need to condense the Dao Heart, which needs to be carried. I don't know, where can I get the carrying things that condense the Nine Folds Dao Fruit!"

"It's not easy to condense the carrying things of the Ninefold Dao Fruit!"

Void White Dao Ancestor frowned.

He had only condensed the Sixfold Dao Fruit at the beginning, and although the carrying thing he found could condense the Sevenfold Dao Fruit, he did not succeed in condensing it, and only condensed the Sixfold Dao Fruit.

It is too rare to be able to condense the carrying object of the Ninefold Dao Fruit.

"Xubai Dao Ancestor, don't you even know?"

Ye Tian asked.

"It's not that I don't know, it's not necessarily now!" Void White Dao Ancestor explained: "I have found such a carrying thing before, but those half-step sixfold primordial ancestors in the primeval realm realm can't use it, and those sixfold primordial ancestor-level Dao ancestors find such a bearer, and they don't keep it at all, and directly take it to other powerful realm boundaries and trade it." After all, the value of such a carrying thing is very high, and if it is taken out and traded, it can be exchanged for a lot of cultivation resources. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

The Void White Dao Ancestor said again: "Endless Holy Ancestor, maybe there is really such a carrying thing in the Ancient Origin Domain Realm, but it is too difficult to find, and it is estimated that other Dao Ancestors will not keep it, if you want to find such a carrying thing, you can only go to the Shattered Void Realm Realm!"

"Shattered Void Boundary?"

Ye Tian had never heard of this boundary, in fact, he didn't know anything about the boundaries outside the primeval realm.

Void White Dao Ancestor said: "The Broken Void Realm is a broken realm, and there is no protection, there are no rules, and the extreme path is chaotic, if you hide there, it is not easy to be found, and any original ancestor can enter the Broken Realm Boundary. Therefore, many district boundaries have chosen to trade in the Shattered Void Realm, and there are even some Dao Ancestors who will open a dojo in the Shattered Void Realm!"

"Void White Dao Ancestor, as far as I know, a half-step sixfold origin ancestor can't leave the realm of the primeval realm, right?"

Ye Tian frowned.

"That's right, it's true that a half-step six-fold ancestor can't leave the realm of the primeval realm, even a half-step sixfold ancestor with no matter how powerful he is, he can't leave here. After all, only when you have reached the Sixfold Origin Ancestor can you perceive the existence of other boundaries and leave. However, there is a Dao Gate within the Ancient Dao Alliance that goes to the Shattered Void Boundary, and you can go to the Shattered Void Realm through the Dao Gate. According to the rules of the Ancient Dao Alliance, each Dao Ancestor has a quota and can take a half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestor to leave the Ancient Origin Domain. Xubai Daozu explained.

As soon as Ye Tian heard this, he immediately understood.

"Void White Dao Ancestor, can you take me to the Shattered Void Realm?"

Ye Tian pleaded.

The Void White Dao Ancestor did not hesitate at all, and said directly: "Naturally, after a while, I will go to the Shattered Void Realm Realm, and the Endless Saint Ancestor will come with me when the time comes!"

"Thank you!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

......

After a period of time passed, the Void White Dao Ancestor informed Ye Tian that he could go to the Shattered Void Boundary.

Since there was only one place, Ye Tian did not bring Han Xuan.

Moreover, if he didn't reach the Sixfold Origin Ancestor Realm, he had no way to take Han Xuan back to the Realm where she was in her previous life, so he could only go to the Shattered Void Realm first to obtain the carrying things that could allow him to condense the Ninefold Dao Fruit.

Taikoo Daomeng, Taikoo Zhenshan.

The Void White Dao Ancestor brought Ye Tian here, and the Dao Gate to the Shattered Void Zone Realm was established here.

Soon, Ye Tian saw the Dao Gate.

"There is also a distance between the district boundaries, and there are certain dangers, and more importantly, some of the district boundaries are very far apart, if there is such a district boundary gate, it will be much more convenient. We can't create such a Dao Gate in the Primeval Realm, its core item was purchased, and it is said to be built by a Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor!"

Subsequently.

Void White Dao Ancestor took Ye Tian through this Dao Gate.

And after Ye Tian and the Void White Dao Ancestor left, the voices of several Dao Ancestors appeared in the void.

"The Void White Dao Ancestor actually took the Endless Saint Ancestor to the Shattered Void Realm Realm!"

"The Endless Saint Ancestor and the Void White Dao Ancestor didn't know each other before, it shouldn't be related, I didn't expect the Void White Dao Ancestor to help the Endless Saint Ancestor!"

"Hehe, the Endless Saint Ancestor has unlimited potential, and the Void White Dao Ancestor likes to befriend those Origin Ancestors with great potential, so naturally he will also befriend the Endless Saint Ancestor!"

"A good man, but his network is indeed very deep, and he even has a lot of friends in other districts!"

"Forget it, leave them alone!"

......

Shattered Void Zone.

Ye Tian and Xubai Dao Ancestor soon came here.

"Heaven and earth here ......"

Ye Tian felt a chaos, there was no complete Extreme Dao between heaven and earth, this place was not suitable for cultivation, and it was impossible to give birth to strong people!

However, as the Void White Dao Ancestor said, if there is an Origin Ancestor hiding in the Shattered Void Realm Realm, it is indeed difficult to find the other party, and if you need to use the power of the Extreme Extreme Dao, most of the effects will be lost here.

In addition, there are not many resources here, only a few Sixfold Ancestors come here to trade, so it is also very quiet, and if you build a dojo in a corner, no one will find out for endless years.

Soon.

Xubai Dao Ancestor took Ye Tian to a trading city.
